name: Tecnoglass Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview Tecnoglass is a leading vertically integrated manufacturer, supplier and installer of high-end aluminum and vinyl windows and architectural glass for the global commercial and residential construction markets. Tecnoglass earned the #1 spot on Forbes list of Americas 100 most successful small-cap companies for 2024, and was ranked among the four largest glass fabricators in 2025 by Glass Magazine.
